mapper.select: SELECT batch_no, batch_date, source_type, batch_status, total_order_count, success_order_count, failed_order_count, total_amount, version_no, created_by, created_at, finished_at, idempotency_key FROM t_clearing_batch ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT batch_no, batch_date, source_type, batch_status, total_order_count, success_order_count, failed_order_count, total_amount, version_no, created_by, created_at, finished_at, idempotency_key FROM t_clearing_batch WHERE batch_no = #{batchNo}

SELECT batch_no, batch_date, source_type, batch_status, total_order_count, success_order_count, failed_order_count, total_amount, version_no, created_by, created_at, finished_at, idempotency_key FROM t_clearing_batch WHERE idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_clearing_batch ( batch_no, batch_date, source_type, batch_status, total_order_count, success_order_count, failed_order_count, total_amount, version_no, created_by, created_at, finished_at, idempotency_key ) VALUES ( #{batchNo}, #{batchDate}, #{sourceType}, #{batchStatus}, #{totalOrderCount}, #{successOrderCount}, #{failedOrderCount}, #{totalAmount}, #{versionNo}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{idempotencyKey} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_clearing_batch SET total_order_count = #{totalOrderCount}, success_order_count = #{successOrderCount}, failed_order_count = #{failedOrderCount}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, version_no = #{versionNo}, batch_status = #{batchStatus}, finished_at = #{finishedAt} WHERE batch_no = #{batchNo}
mapper.select: SELECT clearing_no, batch_no, payment_order_id, order_no, order_amount, merchant_amount, worker_amount, platform_amount, channel_fee_amount, subsidy_amount, clearing_status, rule_no, created_at FROM t_clearing_order ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT clearing_no, batch_no, payment_order_id, order_no, order_amount, merchant_amount, worker_amount, platform_amount, channel_fee_amount, subsidy_amount, clearing_status, rule_no, created_at FROM t_clearing_order WHERE clearing_no = #{clearingNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_clearing_order ( clearing_no, batch_no, payment_order_id, order_no, order_amount, merchant_amount, worker_amount, platform_amount, channel_fee_amount, subsidy_amount, clearing_status, rule_no, created_at ) VALUES ( #{clearingNo}, #{batchNo}, #{paymentOrderId}, #{orderNo}, #{orderAmount}, #{merchantAmount}, #{workerAmount}, #{platformAmount}, #{channelFeeAmount}, #{subsidyAmount}, #{clearingStatus}, #{ruleNo}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT rule_no, rule_name, rule_type, rule_expression, rule_status, version_no, grey_flag, created_at FROM t_clearing_rule ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT rule_no, rule_name, rule_type, rule_expression, rule_status, version_no, grey_flag, created_at FROM t_clearing_rule WHERE rule_no = #{ruleNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_clearing_rule ( rule_no, rule_name, rule_type, rule_expression, rule_status, version_no, grey_flag, created_at ) VALUES ( #{ruleNo}, #{ruleName}, #{ruleType}, #{ruleExpression}, #{ruleStatus}, #{versionNo}, #{greyFlag}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT fee_rule_no, fee_name, fee_type, fee_mode, fee_rate, fixed_amount, fee_bearer, status, created_at FROM t_clearing_fee_rule ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_clearing_fee_rule ( fee_rule_no, fee_name, fee_type, fee_mode, fee_rate, fixed_amount, fee_bearer, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{feeRuleNo}, #{feeName}, #{feeType}, #{feeMode}, #{feeRate}, #{fixedAmount}, #{feeBearer}, #{status}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT share_item_no, clearing_no, share_type, share_target_no, share_target_name, share_amount, share_status, created_at FROM t_clearing_share_item ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT share_item_no, clearing_no, share_type, share_target_no, share_target_name, share_amount, share_status, created_at FROM t_clearing_share_item WHERE clearing_no = #{clearingNo} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_clearing_share_item ( share_item_no, clearing_no, share_type, share_target_no, share_target_name, share_amount, share_status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{shareItemNo}, #{clearingNo}, #{shareType}, #{shareTargetNo}, #{shareTargetName}, #{shareAmount}, #{shareStatus}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT event_no, event_type, biz_no, summary, payload, event_status, created_at FROM t_clearing_event ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_clearing_event ( event_no, event_type, biz_no, summary, payload, event_status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{eventNo}, #{eventType}, #{bizNo}, #{summary}, #{payload}, #{eventStatus}, #{createdAt} )
